user_message: Can you work with me on migration architecture for Fabrikam Residences? This is a renewal account with declining consumption.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-05 11:49 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Fabrikam Residences migration architecture

Just checking in on the migration architecture proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 10:37 EST
Subject: migration architecture - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for migration architecture. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Kevin Lee <kevin.lee@fabrikamresi.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-05 10:02 EST
Subject: Re: Re: migration architecture Timeline

Just checking in on the migration architecture proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Fabrikam Residences: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Cross-Sell Trigger Email template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct migration architecture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
